name: web-standards
description: Web pack — Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn. Auto-invoke nextjs + production-readiness (§R1–§R10) + craft-guide (§1–§15 with stable rule IDs) standards. Audit commands (pre-ship, premium-check, theme-audit, aesthetic-coherence) are thin wrappers that delegate iteration to core-skills:verify-changes. extract-tokens writes the token source of truth. Universal formulas enforced; brand values from user.
